__description: Verified Q&A pairs for ChromaDB resolved_qa_col (learned knowledge store). Stored as 'Q: ... A: ...' text. Based on learn.json memory entry format but without pre-computed vectors (ChromaDB will embed via default_ef). Add pairs for frequently asked, non-trivial questions that required human verification.

qa_pairs.question: <string: exact question phrasing a customer asked>
qa_pairs.answer: <string: verified correct answer from shop owner/staff>
